steps.command:
cat > /home/kali/phase4a-calibration/juice-shop-nuclei-ffuf-20260520T123255Z/nuclei-local-header-observer.yaml <<'YAML'
id: local-juice-shop-security-headers
info:
  name: Local lab security header observation
  author: hermes
  severity: info
  tags: local-lab,headers
http:
  - method: GET
    path:
      - '{{BaseURL}}/'
    matchers:
      - type: status
        status:
          - 200
YAML
nuclei -u http://<lab-ip>:3000 -t /home/kali/phase4a-calibration/juice-shop-nuclei-ffuf-20260520T123255Z/nuclei-local-header-observer.yaml -jsonl -o /home/kali/phase4a-calibration/juice-shop-nuclei-ffuf-20260520T123255Z/nuclei.jsonl -timeout 5 -retries 0 -rl 2 -interactions-cache-size 1 -omit-raw -disable-update-check -silent -no-color > /home/kali/phase4a-calibration/juice-shop-nuclei-ffuf-20260520T123255Z/nuclei.stdout 2> /home/kali/phase4a-calibration/juice-shop-nuclei-ffuf-20260520T123255Z/nuclei.stderr
